title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v5.0.2
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://gitlab.com/redhat/centos-stream/rpms/podman.git):

| dist-git branch | error |
| --------------- | ----- |
| `c10s` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/8095 |


You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body: yes, c10s isn't fully there yet like fedora, this will need local triggering which i'll be working on today. Let's keep this open for now
This was resolved with manual triggering. I'm reporting this to packit upstream to silence future centos stream issues like these.
